full_text:
Guo Zheng
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Guo Zheng. Served Wei achieving fame and rank, as Guo Huai did. Guo Tong’s son. Guo Zheng was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom.
